title: Hypnotized
writer: Felix Adler, Lewis R. Foster, Thomas J. Geraghty
actors: George Moran, Charles Mack, Ernest Torrence
plot: A circus worker wins a sweepstakes prize of $150,000 and must travel to England to present his ticket and collect his winnings. He books passage on a transatlantic liner, but on board is a shady hypnotist who hears about the man's...
